message:
feat(net/unix): add peer_cred support to UnixDatagram

Add peer_cred() method to UnixDatagram for retrieving peer process
credentials on connected datagram sockets. Uses SO_PEERCRED on Linux
and getpeereid on macOS/BSD platforms.

- Import UCred from stream module for type reuse
- Add peer_cred() method with platform-specific implementations
- Add test for peer credential retrieval

Implements asupersync-v32i

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
